schema_policy.field_policy: every business field must trace to source docs, accepted decisions, or committed repo model truth; otherwise omit and block

component_groups.component_name: HR Employee Records and Organisation Structure

seeds.objective: Employee role extension linked to core Person
Stable UUID plus configurable employee display number policy
Configurable departments, teams, positions, grades, and assignments
Single or matrix reporting line model
Compensation metadata emits payroll evidence without owning payroll
Minimal hard lifecycle anchors and configurable status labels
Sensitive HR field redaction and support-window policy
Employee creation evidence/event for Workspace and payroll foundation
Applicant source linkage from CRM lead or direct HR form
Scorecards and interview forms through Configuration Engine
Interview calendar request via events when Workspace active
Offer acceptance recommends employee creation as explicit step
Access provisioning event routed through Gatekeeper
Applicant staged deletion and protection rules
Applicant duplicate detection using CRM dedup patterns

component_groups.component_name: HR Attendance, Leave, and Time Tracking

seeds.objective: Mobile GPS attendance with configurable liveness photo
Manual attendance override with reason and approval defaults
Offline attendance queue and replay evidence
Duplicate, clock-skew, late, and missing-checkout exceptions

component_groups.component_name: HR Performance, Commission, Policy, and Offboarding

seeds.objective: Commission calculation from CRM/payment evidence refs
Approved commission batch event to payroll
Membership policy from Access Core roles and employee teams
Workspace message search via 6A Search/File layer

component_groups.component_name: Workspace Tasks, Projects, Documents, and Knowledge

seeds.objective: Task record with full task fields
Configurable task status with hard anchors
Project dependency engine without UI Gantt
Time log evidence for future billing dimensions
Calendar origin event refs from HR/tasks/events/LMS later
Event scheduling via Workspace Calendar refs
Attendee to CRM lead linkage where applicable
Event lead handoff events, not CRM direct writes
Cancellation state with refund delegated to Finance/payment
QR ticket issuing from registration/payment state
Manual check-in override with reason and approval
Duplicate check-in blocked and recorded as exception
Attendance certificate evidence only, LMS certification deferred
